name: the-mules-court
description: A Love Letter-style card game of deduction, risk, and elimination set in Isaac Asimov's Foundation universe, built with Phaser.
author: Cornelius Donley <admin@tuesdaycrowd.com>

scripts.dev: bun log.js dev && bunx --bun vite --config vite/config.dev.mjs
scripts.build: bun log.js build && bunx --bun vite build --config vite/config.prod.mjs
